title: No test for secretx:// backward-compat error path
description: SecretUri::parse() has a special early return for URIs starting with 'secretx://' that emits a MIGRATION.md hint. This code path has no unit test. If the check were accidentally deleted or the condition changed, no test would fail. Add: SecretUri::parse("secretx://env/MY_VAR") must return Err(InvalidUri) whose message contains both the old format description and 'MIGRATION.md'.
